# `nise profile rollback`

- **Usage**: `nise profile rollback [-J --json] [PROFILE] [GENERATION]`
- **Source code**: [`src/cli/profile/rollback.rs`](https://github.com/jdx/mise/blob/main/src/cli/profile/rollback.rs)

Roll back the current project profile

## Arguments

### `[PROFILE]`

Project profile name

**Default:** `default`

### `[GENERATION]`

Generation to switch to; defaults to the previous generation

## Flags

### `-J --json`

Output JSON
